raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 719, The Law Enforcement Communications Transparency Act, seeks to restore access to police radio communications for the media.",
    "The open access policy for police radio communications that existed since the 1920s was changed in October 2020.",
    "Approximately 100 out of more than 700 law enforcement agencies surveyed have chosen to encrypt all radio communications rather than train officers on what to share.",
    "The number of law enforcement agencies choosing to encrypt communications is reportedly increasing.",
    "Hearing police radio communications can enhance the accountability of police departments.",
    "Access to police radio communications helps the media report on public safety activities such as accidents or shootings.",
    "SB 719 requires law enforcement agencies that encrypt communications to grant media access to review communications within 30 days."
  ]
}
```
